content:
I'll work on the Coordination Repo infrastructure in the coming days/weeks to prepare for a potential 2nd wave of volunteers, and potentially work on 24's story to have something to contribute while I continue working on gameplay stuff on the side.

So far as I'm aware, the fundamental effect of most of the game's functions aren't going to be changing drastically due to the CN rewrites, so I should be safe to do evidence/information gathering, so I can be prepared with a bulk of work that I would only need to double-check and change to fit with any new style choices when the lock is eventually lifted.

<@1376763322568937562> planning to do a proofreading pass on the main story now just to ensure any spelling/grammar issues are cleared up and to clean up any awkward phrasing/wordings, hopefully that's okay, please let me know if not <:auritacry:1396906080516440278> 

also I was originally working on the Miryam Dreamscape before but please feel free to redo it whenever you get there...unfortunately I think I bit off a lot more than I can chew in terms of workload so I doubt I'll progress significantly on it and I don't want players to wait a year before I get through the whole thing <:scared1:1356053141816213507>

https://drive.google.com/drive/u/1/folders/1nyN6CCobUrm48_fCfsMd8JjCSNtWzKZL

sorry! it seems it failed to upload; i added it again!!

embeds.title: Google Drive: Sign-in
embeds.description: Access Google Drive with a Google account (for personal use) or Google Workspace account (for business use).

content:
I see! Sure, I'm more than happy to pick up Miryam's from where you left.
And I'm confident I won't be butchering your work like the agency we hired last time<:karen_nervous:1408324291237511259>

About main story:
sure, if you'd like to! do you mind only submitting the lines you edited (instead of like whole chapters?)
